title: chrysosplenium lanuginosum var. dunnianum
intro: Chrysosplenium lanuginosum var. dunnianum, also known as Dunn's woodland sorrel, is a rare and endangered variety of the chrysosplenium lanuginosum plant, a flowering perennial native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium lanuginosum var. dunnianum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea or used in herbal formulas, with its leaves and stems being harvested and dried for use in various herbal preparations.
